title: PC & Laptop Upgrades
headline: SSD, RAM, and performance tuning that actually lasts.
description: Professional PC and laptop upgrades including SSD and RAM installations, thermal servicing, and performance tuning, helping homeowners and small businesses across Ocala, Belleview, The Villages, and Central Florida extend the life of their hardware.

sections.heading: Did You Know?
paragraph: Insufficient RAM can slow a system dramatically even when the processor is not fully utilized.
Replacing a mechanical hard drive with a solid-state drive can improve load times and responsiveness by several times.
Many laptops and desktops support more memory and faster storage than they ship with by default.
Firmware and BIOS updates can improve hardware compatibility, stability, and in some cases performance.
Dust buildup and degraded thermal paste can cause overheating, triggering thermal throttling and reduced system speed.

sections.heading: What We Do
paragraph: We upgrade and optimize PCs and laptops to improve speed, stability, and overall lifespan, handling diagnostics, parts sourcing, installation, and testing.
items: SSD installation with safe operating system and data migration
RAM upgrades with stability and compatibility validation
Thermal paste replacement and internal dust removal
Firmware and BIOS updates with post-upgrade testing

sections.heading: How It Works
paragraph: We evaluate your system and recommend the most cost-effective upgrades based on how you use your computer.
After sourcing quality components, we install, test, and verify stability before returning a noticeably faster and quieter system.
